metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2372
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Electron microscopy of the CA1 and CA3 regions using peroxidase-based staining of catenin delta/p120catenin, indicates expression in the presynaptic compartment, associated with the active zone region.

Antibody info: 'Two monoclonal anti- bodies (mAbs) raised against p120ctn were used. mAb pp120 has been raised against p120ctn carboxyl-terminal amino acids 790-911 and recognizes all known p120ctn isoforms. mAb 6H11 was raised against the amino-terminal region of p120ctn, amino acids 8-349, and recognizes spe- cifically isoforms 1 and 2 of p120ctn'.. Experimental description: Immunoelectron microscopy
Adult rats were transcardially perfused with 4% parafor- maldehyde/0.1% glutaraldehyde in 0.1 M phosphate buffer (pH 7.4). Brains were dissected and immersed in the fixative solution for 3 h. Vibratome sections were cut in the coronal plane and collected in PBS.
